sn45.62:1.2: It can be expected of a monk who has appropriate attention that he will develop the noble eightfold path, that he will pursue the noble eightfold path.
sn45.62:1.3: “And how does a monk with appropriate attention develop the noble eightfold path, pursue the noble eightfold path?
sn45.62:1.4: “There is the case where a monk develops right view ending in the subduing of passion, ending in the subduing of aversion, ending in the subduing of delusion. He develops right resolve… right speech… right action… right livelihood… right effort… right mindfulness… right concentration ending in the subduing of passion, ending in the subduing of aversion, ending in the subduing of delusion.
sn45.62:1.5: “This, monks, is how a monk with appropriate attention develops the noble eightfold path, pursues the noble eightfold path.”
